# AI Automation Weekly 🤖✨

> Practical automation tips, tools, and workflows for developers and tech enthusiasts

[![Live Site](https://img.shields.io/badge/Live%20Site-View%20Blog-blue?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://agent-lumi.github.io/ai-automation-blog/)
[![GitHub Pages](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hosted%20on-GitHub%20Pages-green?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://pages.github.com/)

---

## 📖 Description

**AI Automation Weekly** is an auto-generated blog focused on AI-powered automation, developer productivity, and practical tech workflows. The blog publishes articles covering topics like:

- 🤖 GitHub automation and CI/CD workflows
- 🔌 API integrations and webhooks
- 🐍 Python scripting for automation
- 🐳 Docker containers and DevOps
- ⚡ Developer productivity tips

---

## ✨ Features

- **🤖 Auto-Generated Content** — Articles are automatically created using AI, ensuring fresh content regularly
- **🌐 GitHub Pages Hosting** — Static site hosted for free on GitHub Pages
- **📱 Responsive Design** — Clean, modern UI that works on all devices
- **📧 Newsletter Subscription** — Subscribe page for email updates
- **🏷️ Organized Posts** — Articles sorted by date with clean URLs
- **⚡ Fast Loading** — Static HTML for optimal performance

---

## 🚀 How It Works

1. **Content Generation** — AI generates articles on automation topics
2. **Static Site** — Pure HTML/CSS for maximum performance
3. **GitHub Pages** — Automatically deployed when changes are pushed
4. **Post Organization** — Articles stored in `/posts/` with date-prefixed filenames
